properties.displayName: Deny resource groups outside the PR-preview naming + tag contract
properties.description: Denies creation of any resource group whose name does not match the PR-preview prefix pattern `rg-atomicly-pr-*` or which lacks the mandatory ephemeral-preview tags (lifetime=ephemeral, created-by=github-actions). NOTE on naming: Azure Policy field operators `like` / `notLike` use glob wildcards (`*` = any sequence, `?` = any single char) — they cannot express the full regex `^rg-atomicly-pr-[0-9]+-[a-f0-9]{7}$`. This policy enforces the prefix; finer-grained name validation (digit-only PR number, 7-hex-char SHA) is enforced by the workflow preflight (`pr-preview.yml`) and by the `pr-preview` principal's narrow access pattern (it only ever issues `az group create` with names it constructs itself). The dev resource group `rg-atomicly-dev-*` does NOT match `rg-atomicly-pr-*` and would be denied — so the assignment MUST exclude the dev RG via `notScopes` at assignment time (see infra/README.md Phase 0 bootstrap docs).

metadata.description: Enable or disable the policy effect.
